title: Charlotte First Responders Win Charity Hockey Game
summary: Charlotte Fire and Medic teams triumph over CMPD and MCSO in the annual Salute to Heroes hockey game, raising funds for first responders and their families.
charlotte_impact: Supports first responders and their families, fostering community spirit and raising funds for those in need.

title: Shooting Reported in East Charlotte
summary: A shooting occurred in a neighborhood off Albemarle Road in east Charlotte, resulting in one person injured. Police are investigating the incident.
charlotte_impact: Adds to concerns about local safety and prompts further investigation by law enforcement.

title: Fatal House Fire in Union County Under Investigation
summary: A house fire in Union County early Easter Sunday resulted in one fatality. Officials are currently investigating the cause of the fire.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of house fires and the importance of fire safety measures.

title: Missing Matthews Teen Found Safe
summary: A missing teenager from Matthews has been located safe, according to police reports. The teen was found Sunday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Relieves community concern and highlights the effectiveness of local police efforts.

title: Victim Identified in West Charlotte Fatal Crash
summary: The victim of a deadly car crash on Yorkmont Road in west Charlotte has been identified. The cause of the collision remains under investigation.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about traffic safety and the ongoing investigation into the crash.

title: Man Killed After Being Struck by Two Cars in Charlotte
summary: A man died after being hit by two vehicles on East Independence Boulevard. Police confirmed that neither driver was speeding or impaired.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about pedestrian safety and traffic regulations on busy roads.

title: Teen Charged with Murder in Pageland Shooting Death
summary: A teenage suspect has surrendered in Pageland in connection with the fatal shooting of a 16-year-old, facing murder and weapon charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses youth violence and the legal consequences of gun-related crimes.

title: Man Faces Attempted Murder Charge After NoDa Attack
summary: Aleksandros Soutzos is charged with attempted murder after allegedly beating a man, setting his house on fire, and assaulting a woman in NoDa.
charlotte_impact: Highlights domestic violence and the severity of violent crimes in the NoDa area.

title: Rain on Easter Sunday in Charlotte
summary: Easter Sunday brings cooler temperatures and much-needed rain to Charlotte, providing relief amidst severe drought conditions.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental concerns and the impact of weather on local conditions.

title: Shooting Reported in Southeast Charlotte
summary: One person was shot on Pineburr Road, near Monroe Road, in southeast Charlotte. Medic confirmed the incident.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about public safety and the prevalence of gun violence.

title: Woman Accused of Assaulting Officer with Car
summary: Tanaezah Austin, 25, was arrested for allegedly hitting a Charlotte-Mecklenburg police officer with her car, following a prior assault charge in April.
charlotte_impact: Addresses assaults on law enforcement and repeat offenders.

title: Victim Identified in Rock Hill Interstate Crash
summary: The York County Coroner has identified the victim of a deadly interstate crash in Rock Hill as a 37-year-old Rock Hill woman.
charlotte_impact: Reports on traffic fatalities and the impact on families and the community.

title: Infant Mortality Disparities Persist in Mecklenburg
summary: Mecklenburg County shows improvements in infant mortality rates, but significant health disparities endanger Black infants.
charlotte_impact: Highlights critical health disparities and the need for targeted interventions.

title: Two Injured in University City Rollover Crash
summary: A rollover crash on University City Boulevard near I-485 resulted in injuries to two people. Emergency services responded to the scene.
charlotte_impact: Reports on traffic incidents and potential hazards on local roads.

title: Kings Mountain Police Seek Suspect in Parking Lot Shooting
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., accused of firing shots into a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses gun violence and the search for a suspect wanted on attempted murder charges.
